  • Package org.sosy_lab.common.rationals

    • Class org.sosy_lab.common.rationals.Rational

      class Rational extends Number implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1657347377738275521L

      • Serialized Fields

        • den
          BigInteger den
        • num
          BigInteger num
          Rationals are always stored in the normal form. That is:

          a) denominator is strictly positive. b) numerator and denominator do not have common factors. c) 0, 1 and -1 have unique representation corresponding to the class static constants ZERO, ONE and NEG_ONE. That is, they can be compared using the '==' operator.

  • Package org.sosy_lab.common.time
